description_long: This bungalow features a modern architectural design with clean lines, large glass windows, and a flat roof. The structure is surrounded by a small landscaped area with a few trees and paved walkways, and it is flanked by two large, simple rectangular buildings. The main building has a prominent entryway, visible outdoor seating, and a patio area, suggesting a focus on indoor-outdoor living. The exterior appears to be constructed primarily of concrete, glass, and metal, with some wooden accents visible on the patio. The windows are expansive and arranged asymmetrically, providing ample natural light to the interior. The overall setting suggests a contemporary urban neighborhood with a focus on minimalism and functionality.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large glass windows, a landscaped patio, and minimalist design, set between two large rectangular buildings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, patio area, and landscaped surroundings with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the glass facade, outdoor seating, and proximity to adjacent buildings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the bungalow, additional windows, and the relationship to the neighboring structures.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing more of the patio, trees, and the flat roof design.
